A '''campaign''' consisting of a series of battles took place on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agricultural world of [[Reytha]], one of the Empire's major "breadbasket" planets, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The planet faced an incursion by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and its [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Antes Belladar]], was forced to call for support. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived with an army to eliminate the Rebel presence on Reytha.

==Prelude==
After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Evacuation of Yavin|lost]] its [[Great Temple/Legends|headquarters]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], its forces took over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]] for its extensive food supplies. Reytha's [[Governor/Legends|governor]], [[Antes Belladar]], was considered by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] to be either soft or a traitor, and the Rebels were able to establish bases on the [[Montrosa Islands]], as well as at [[Reytha Minor]]. Bandits took over the the Food Storage facilities at [[Breeda]], and [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]] attacked the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Teks]]. The incursions grew to the point that Governor Belladar was forced to call in reinforcements. The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived with a strike force on a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]]. His forces consisted of 2 [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]], 3 [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|Light All Terrain Personal Transports]], 2 Heavy [[Dewback trooper/Legends|Dewback troopers]], 12 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]], and a [[2-1C medical droid]].<ref name="SW:GB" /> The campaign was part of the Rebel strategy to distract the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] away from the [[Yavin blockade]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="TEGtW" />

==The battle==
===Rooting out the cities===
{{Expandsect}}
[[File:Battle_of_Reytha.jpg|left|thumb|Vader and his troops near the city of Breeda.]]
Darth Vader ordered his troops to go to the abandoned base at [[Yeere]], with the probe droids [[Scout/Legends|scouting ahead]]. The base was reactivated, and the Imperial forces started fighting back against the Rebels. Eventually, the Vipers reported back to Vader regarding an attack on Teks during herding of nerfs discovered to the east of Yeere. The attacks on Teks were later identified to have originated from Reytha Minor, a Rebel-occupied city to the north.<ref name="SW:GB" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}
Additional units, including [[Thermal detonator trooper (Galactic Empire)|Imperial Thermal Detonator Troopers]], [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]], [[All Terrain Advance Raider]]s, [[Energy pummel/Legends|Pummels]], [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|All Terrain Anti-Aircraft]], and [[Imperial mobile artillery|mobile artillery]] pieces were outfitted at Yeere for the attack. The Imperials destroyed the bandits' [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]] in [[Breeda]], and after Page's Commandos attacked a stormtrooper squad in [[Teks]], retook the town. Although initially underestimating the size of the Rebel base in Reytha Minor, Darth Vader led his forces in destroying its command center.<ref name="SW:GB" />
{{Endgame}}

As the campaign went on, Darth Vader's frustration with Belladar grew, and with suspicions about the Governor's true allegiance, Vader finally had enough and killed Belladar with a [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force choke|Force choke]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

===Montrosa Islands===
{{Expandsect}}
[[File:Tie_Montrosa.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Imperial TIE fighters near the Montrosa Islands]]
Darth Vader then ordered all Imperial forces on Reytha to converge at the Montrosa Islands. He took command at an Imperial [[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]] along with 6 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], 8 [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droids]], 16 stormtroopers, 2 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], 3 [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|All Terrain Personal Transports]], and 2 Dewback troopers. Along with other portions of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], he attacked the Rebel bases on the nearby islands, eventually hunting down every unit. To supply his army and [[Imperial Maritime Division|navy]], he took control of aquaharvesters.<ref name="SW:GB" />

The [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] fielded [[Tauntaun Trooper]]s, [[Rebel trooper/Legends|infantry troopers]], and [[Rebel combat speeder|combat speeders]]. The [[Rebel Navy (aquatic)|Rebel Navy]] kept patrols of [[Hunter (aquatic vehicle)|Hunters]], [[Javelin (vehicle)|Javelins]], and [[Scout (Rebel Alliance)|Scouts]]. The [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Rebel Air Force]] harassed the Imperials with [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wings]]. Darth Vader and his army, though, were able to defeat the Rebel bases.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Aftermath==
With the threat to Reytha gone, Darth Vader continued his search for the Rebel leadership in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Reytha campaign was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared two consecutive missions during the Darth Vader campaign. The player may create any-sized army to destroy the Rebel bases. In the first mission, retaking Teks and Breeda is an optional objective, although this article assumes the player did so. Page's Commandos appear during the first battle despite the fact that the unit was formed almost [[5 ABY/Legends|5 years later]]. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] can be spotted on the game map during the first Reytha mission. However it requires cheat codes to see her.
